heading: Procedures
body:
To access Atlas clusters with Workforce Identity Federation, complete the following steps:

- Configure a Workforce Identity Provider (one-time setup).

  - [Configure An External Identity Provider Application](configure-idp-oidc).

  - [enable Workload IdP for your organization](configure-oidc).

- Grant external identities (user principals) or groups access
  to MongoDB clusters.

- Authenticate to your Atlas clusters with MongoDB Shell or Compass.
